---
title: "Outputs"
---

## Publications

Peer-reviewed publications arising from the GEMMA project will be listed here.
All publications are open access where possible.

*Publications to be added.*

---

## Datasets

Measurement datasets and model outputs are archived in publicly accessible
repositories.

*Dataset links to be added.*

---

## Software and tools

Open-source tools developed by the GEMMA team:

*Tool descriptions to be added.*

---

## Policy documents

Summaries and briefings prepared for policy audiences are available from the
[research highlights](../research-highlights/index.qmd) pages, where each
highlight can be downloaded as a PDF policy brief.
